title.en: Vocabulary for the representation of the employment indicators data cube within the EDINT project
title.es: Vocabulario para la representación del cubo de indicadores de empleo dentro del proyecto EDINT

title.value: Vocabulario para la representación del cubo de indicadores de empleo dentro del proyecto EDINT
Vocabulary for the representation of the employment indicators data cube within the EDINT project

comment.en: A single observation in the cube, may have one or more associated measured values
Number of persons affiliated with the Social Security system in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de personas afiliadas al sistema de Seguridad Social en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

labels.es: Número de personas afiliadas a la Seguridad Social

comment.en: Number of active persons in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de personas activas en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: Number of registered job seekers in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de demandantes de empleo registrados en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: Number of unemployed persons in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de personas desempleadas en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: Number of employed persons in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de personas ocupadas en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: Number of employment contracts registered in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de contratos de trabajo registrados en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: Number of persons in registered unemployment according to SEPE administrative records, for the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de personas en situación de paro registrado según los registros administrativos del SEPE, en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: The class of components which represent the measured value of the phenomenon being observed

Represents a generalized hierarchy of concepts which can be used for coding. The hierarchy is defined by one or more roots together with a property which relates concepts in the hierarchy to thier child concept .  The same concepts may be members of multiple hierarchies provided that different qb:parentChildProperty values are used for each hierarchy.
Abstract class of things which reference one or more ComponentProperties
Type of employment contract associated with the employment observation, when applicable.
comment.es: Tipo de contrato laboral asociado a la observación de empleo, cuando aplique.

comment.en: Economic activity associated with the employment observation, represented using a controlled classification such as CNAE.
comment.es: Actividad económica asociada a la observación de empleo, representada mediante una clasificación controlada como la CNAE.

comment.en: Attribute that indicates the age of an individual, usually expressed in years or grouped into age ranges for classification purposes.
comment.es: Característica de una persona que indica cuántos años tiene en un momento determinado, ya sea mediante un valor concreto o mediante un grupo de edad.

comment.en: Thematic sector associated with the employment observation.
comment.es: Sector temático asociado a la observación de empleo.

comment.en: Generic measure dimension, the value of this dimension indicates which measure (from the set of measures in the DSD) is being given by the obsValue (or other primary measure)
Period of time or point in time to which the measured observation is intended to refer.
comment.es: Período de tiempo o punto en el tiempo al que se destina la observación medida.

comment.en: Administrative region associated.
comment.es: Región administrativa asociada.

comment.en: Attribute used to represent the sex category associated with an individual in a given data collection context.
comment.es: Característica de una persona que permite clasificarla dentro de una categoría sexual utilizada en un determinado contexto estadístico, administrativo o de registro.

comment.en: The class of components which represent the dimensions of the cube
Abstract superclass for everything that can have attributes and dimensions
Defines the structure of a DataSet or slice
Type of employment contract associated with the employment observation, when applicable.
comment.es: Tipo de contrato laboral asociado a la observación de empleo, cuando aplique.

comment.en: Economic activity associated with the employment observation, represented using a controlled classification such as CNAE.
comment.es: Actividad económica asociada a la observación de empleo, representada mediante una clasificación controlada como la CNAE.

comment.en: Thematic sector associated with the employment observation.
comment.es: Sector temático asociado a la observación de empleo.

comment.en: Superclass of all coded ComponentProperties
Used to define properties of a component (attribute, dimension etc) which are specific to its usage in a DSD.
The class of components which represent attributes of observations in the cube, e.g. unit of measurement
Denotes a subset of a DataSet defined by fixing a subset of the dimensional values, component properties on the Slice
A, possibly arbitrary, group of observations.
Abstract super-property of all properties representing dimensions, attributes or measures
Represents a collection of observations, possibly organized into various slices, conforming to some common dimensional structure.
Denotes a subset of the component properties of a DataSet which are fixed in the corresponding slices
indicates a slice key which is used for slices in this dataset
Number of employment contracts registered in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de contratos de trabajo registrados en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: indicates the data set of which this observation is a part
An alternative to qb:componentProperty which makes explicit that the component is a measure
Specifies a root of the hierarchy. A hierarchy may have multiple roots but must have at least one.
Attribute that indicates the age of an individual, usually expressed in years or grouped into age ranges for classification purposes.
comment.es: Característica de una persona que indica cuántos años tiene en un momento determinado, ya sea mediante un valor concreto o mediante un grupo de edad.

comment.en: Period of time or point in time to which the measured observation is intended to refer.
comment.es: Período de tiempo o punto en el tiempo al que se destina la observación medida.

comment.en: Specifies a property which relates a parent concept in the hierarchy to a child concept.
Economic activity associated with the employment observation, represented using a controlled classification such as CNAE.
comment.es: Actividad económica asociada a la observación de empleo, representada mediante una clasificación controlada como la CNAE.

comment.en: Indicates a subset of a DataSet defined by fixing a subset of the dimensional values
An alternative to qb:componentProperty which makes explicit that the component is a dimension
Number of registered job seekers in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de demandantes de empleo registrados en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: gives the concept which is being measured or indicated by a ComponentProperty
Number of unemployed persons in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de personas desempleadas en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: indicates a ComponentProperty (i.e. attribute/dimension) expected on a DataSet, or a dimension fixed in a SliceKey
Number of employed persons in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de personas ocupadas en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: Indicates the level at which the component property should be attached, this might an qb:DataSet, qb:Slice or qb:Observation, or a qb:MeasureProperty.
indicates the structure to which this data set conforms
An alternative to qb:componentProperty which makes explicit that the component is a attribute
An alternative to qb:componentProperty which makes explicit that the component is a measure dimension
Indicates a group of observations. The domain of this property is left open so that a group may be attached to different resources and need not be restricted to a single DataSet
Generic measure dimension, the value of this dimension indicates which measure (from the set of measures in the DSD) is being given by the obsValue (or other primary measure)
Thematic sector associated with the employment observation.
comment.es: Sector temático asociado a la observación de empleo.

comment.en: Administrative region associated.
comment.es: Región administrativa asociada.

comment.en: Attribute used to represent the sex category associated with an individual in a given data collection context.
comment.es: Característica de una persona que permite clasificarla dentro de una categoría sexual utilizada en un determinado contexto estadístico, administrativo o de registro.

comment.en: indicates the sub-key corresponding to this slice

label.es: Número de personas afiliadas a la Seguridad Social

comment.en: Number of persons affiliated with the Social Security system in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de personas afiliadas al sistema de Seguridad Social en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: Number of active persons in the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de personas activas en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.

comment.en: indicates a priority order for the components of sets with this structure, used to guide presentations - lower order numbers come before higher numbers, un-numbered components come last
gives the code list associated with a CodedProperty
indicates a component specification which is included in the structure of the dataset
Type of employment contract associated with the employment observation, when applicable.
comment.es: Tipo de contrato laboral asociado a la observación de empleo, cuando aplique.

comment.en: indicates a observation contained within this slice of the data set

Indicates whether a component property is required (true) or optional (false) in the context of a DSD. Only applicable
    to components correspond to an attribute. Defaults to false (optional).
Number of persons in registered unemployment according to SEPE administrative records, for the reference period and administrative division.
comment.es: Número de personas en situación de paro registrado según los registros administrativos del SEPE, en el periodo de referencia y la división administrativa correspondiente.
